hero.title: Tradition & Excellence since 1990
hero.subtitle: Welcome to JBarquinha! Located in Portugal, we deal with all matters relating to classic cars. Want to buy or sell? Don’t hesitate to contact us.

services.classicsForSaleDesc: We have a carefully selected range of classic cars ready to find a new owner!
services.consignmentServicesDesc: Want to sell your classic car? Leave your car with us and we'll take care of everything. We appraise, promote and handle the entire sales process to ensure you get the best deal possible
services.consultDesc: Our experience and knowledge acquired over the years dealing with classic cars can be useful to you, so don't hesitate to contact us !

newsletter.title: Subscribe for Latest Updates
newsletter.description: Keep up to date with all the cars available, exclusive offers and exciting events. Enter your e-mail address and receive regular updates on the world of classic cars at JBarquinha. Join Us !

About-Us.text1: Time passes quickly, especially when we do what we love.
About-Us.text2: I have dedicated my life to classic cars. At some point, this 40-year-old passion turned into a business, helping, I think, many enthusiasts like me to realize their dream of owning a classic car. I will continue to share my knowledge and passion of so many years with my customers, always trying to provide the best service in this very specific and sometimes complicated area.
